title: mentha × dalmatica var. juranyiana
intro: Mentha × dalmatica var. juranyiana, also known as Hungarian peppermint or broad-leaved peppermint, is a hybrid mint plant that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to ease digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and alleviate headaches due to its menthol and menthone content. The health benefits of Mentha × dalmatica var. juranyiana include its potential to soothe respiratory issues, improve cognitive function, and even act as an antiseptic agent, making it a popular ingredient in traditional herbal medicine. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tea, essential oil, or infused in water to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
